description.text: A solitary bridge spans a vast expanse of water. Defend and attack over this. One Cube and a Base.

ru.original: A solitary bridge spans a vast expanse of water. Defend and attack over this. One Cube and a Base.
ru.translation: Много воды и один мост — вот и всё поле боя. Защищайся и атакуй. Один куб и база.

es.original: A solitary bridge spans a vast expanse of water. Defend and attack over this. One Cube and a Base.
es.translation:
Un solo puente comunica ambos extremos.
Un generador y un núcleo.

de.original: A solitary bridge spans a vast expanse of water. Defend and attack over this. One Cube and a Base.
de.translation: Eine einsame Brücke führt über eine weite Wasserfläche. Ein Generator und eine Basis.

pt.original: A solitary bridge spans a vast expanse of water. Defend and attack over this. One Cube and a Base.
pt.translation: Uma ponte solitária sobre uma grande extensão de água. Defenda e ataque sobre ela. Um Cubo e uma Base.

fr.original: A solitary bridge spans a vast expanse of water. Defend and attack over this. One Cube and a Base.
fr.translation: Un pont solitaire suspendu au-dessus d'une vaste étendue d'eau. Attaquez et défendez en équilibre ! Un cube et une base.
